from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    if not triples:
        return ""
    # Mapping of predicates to human‑readable phrase generators
    # Don't assume units - preserve original data
    phrase_map = {
        "cityServed": lambda o: f"'s city served is {o}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInFeet": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} feet above sea level",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevelInMetres": lambda o: f"is at an elevation of {o} metres above sea level",
        "location": lambda o: f"'s location is {o}",
        "operatingOrganisation": lambda o: f"'s operating organisation is {o}",
        "runwayLength": lambda o: f"has a runway length of {o}",
        "runwayName": lambda o: f"'s runway name is {o}",
        "country": lambda o: f"is in {'the ' + o if o.startswith('United') or o == 'Netherlands' or o == 'Philippines' else o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda o: f"is part of {o}",
        "1stRunwayLengthFeet": lambda o: f"'s first runway length is {o} feet",
        "1stRunwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"'s first runway surface is {o}",
        "3rdRunwayLengthFeet": lambda o: f"'s third runway length is {o} feet",
        "icaoLocationIdentifier": lambda o: f"'s ICAO code is {o}",
        "locationIdentifier": lambda o: f"'s location identifier is {o}",
        "iataLocationIdentifier": lambda o: f"'s IATA code is {o}",
        "nativeName": lambda o: f"'s native name is {o}",
        "leaderParty": lambda o: f"'s leader party is {o}",
        "capital": lambda o: f"'s capital is {o}",
        "language": lambda o: f"has {o}" if "language" in o.lower() else f"speaks {o}",
        "leader": lambda o: f"'s leader is {o}",
        "owner": lambda o: f"'s owner is {o}",
        "1stRunwayLengthMetre": lambda o: f"'s first runway length is {o} metres",
        "4thRunwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"'s fourth runway surface is {o}",
        "5thRunwayNumber": lambda o: f"'s fifth runway number is {o}",
        "largestCity": lambda o: f"'s largest city is {o}",
        "4thRunwayLengthFeet": lambda o: f"'s fourth runway length is {o} feet",
        "1stRunwayNumber": lambda o: f"'s first runway number is {o}",
        "administrativeArrondissement": lambda o: f"'s administrative arrondissement is {o}",
        "mayor": lambda o: f"'s mayor is {o}",
        "2ndRunwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"'s second runway surface is {o}",
        "3rdRunwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"'s third runway surface is {o}",
        "runwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"'s runway surface is {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda o: f"'s official language is {o}",
        "city": lambda o: f"'s city is {o}",
        "jurisdiction": lambda o: f"'s jurisdiction is {o}",
        "demonym": lambda o: f"'s people are called {o}",
        "aircraftHelicopter": lambda o: f"'s helicopter is {o}",
        "transportAircraft": lambda o: f"'s transport aircraft is {o}",
        "currency": lambda o: f"'s currency is {o}",
        "headquarter": lambda o: f"'s headquarters is at {o}",
        "class": lambda o: f"'s class is {o}",
        "division": lambda o: f"'s division is {o}",
        "order": lambda o: f"'s order is {o}",
        "regionServed": lambda o: f"'s region served is {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda o: f"has the leader title of {o}",
        "hubAirport": lambda o: f"'s hub airport is {o}",
        "aircraftFighter": lambda o: f"'s fighter aircraft is {o}",
        "attackAircraft": lambda o: f"'s attack aircraft is {o}",
        "battle": lambda o: f"'s battle involvement is {o}",
        "5thRunwaySurfaceType": lambda o: f"has a fifth runway surface of {o}",
        "countySeat": lambda o: f"'s county seat is {o}",
        "chief": lambda o: f"'s chief is {o}",
        "foundedBy": lambda o: f"'s founder is {o}",
        "postalCode": lambda o: f"'s postal code is {o}",
        "areaCode": lambda o: f"'s area code is {o}",
        "foundingYear": lambda o: f"'s founding year is {o}",
        "ceremonialCounty": lambda o: f"'s ceremonial county is {o}",
    }

    # Process each triple and build phrases directly
    parts: list[str] = []
    for t in triples:
        s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object

        generator = phrase_map.get(p)
        if generator:
            phrase = generator(o)
        elif p.endswith("RunwayLengthFeet"):
            rn = p.split("Runway")[0].lower()
            phrase = f"has a {rn} runway length of {o} feet"
        elif p.endswith("RunwayLengthMetre"):
            rn = p.split("Runway")[0].lower()
            phrase = f"has a {rn} runway length of {o} metres"
        elif p.endswith("RunwaySurfaceType"):
            rn = p.split("Runway")[0].lower()
            phrase = f"has a {rn} runway surface of {o}"
        elif p.endswith("RunwayNumber"):
            rn = p.split("Runway")[0].lower()
            phrase = f"has a {rn} runway number {o}"
        else:
            phrase = f"{p} {o}"

        parts.append(f"{s} {phrase}")

    # Remove duplicate parts to avoid redundancy
    seen = set()
    unique_parts = []
    for part in parts:
        if part not in seen:
            seen.add(part)
            unique_parts.append(part)
    parts = unique_parts

    # Join all parts into a single fluent complex sentence
    if len(parts) == 0:
        sentence = ""
    elif len(parts) == 1:
        sentence = parts[0] + "."
    elif len(parts) == 2:
        sentence = parts[0] + ", and " + parts[1] + "."
    else:
        # Create complex sentence with relative clauses for better flow
        # Use "which" for non-first parts to create more natural relative clauses
        sentence = parts[0]
        for i, part in enumerate(parts[1:], 1):
            if i == len(parts) - 1:
                # Last part - use "and" before it
                sentence += ", and " + part
            else:
                # Middle parts - use semicolons with "which" for relative clauses
                sentence += "; " + part
        sentence += "."

    # Ensure the first character is capitalised
    if sentence:
        sentence = sentence[0].upper() + sentence[1:]
    return sentence

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
